title: Job Opening Teacher at Navneet Education

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Navneet Education
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
